name: I-P0-1
label: I-P0-1 — No direct push to main ever
condition: No direct push to main ever
ifViolated: Unreviewed code ships
enforcedBy: GitHub branch protection rules

name: I-P0-2
label: I-P0-2 — CI uses OIDC tokens — no long-lived secrets stored in CI
condition: CI uses OIDC tokens — no long-lived secrets stored in CI
ifViolated: Credential leak if repo compromised
enforcedBy: GitHub OIDC + cloud IAM

name: I-P0-3
label: I-P0-3 — Push scoped to exact repo + branch only
condition: Push scoped to exact repo + branch only
ifViolated: Any branch can push any image
enforcedBy: Registry policy + OIDC role binding

name: I-P0-4
label: I-P0-4 — Cluster rejects any image not signed by the pipeline
condition: Cluster rejects any image not signed by the pipeline
ifViolated: Unsigned images run in production
enforcedBy: Kyverno ClusterPolicy

name: I-P0-5
label: I-P0-5 — All dependency updates arrive as PRs — never manual edits
condition: All dependency updates arrive as PRs — never manual edits
ifViolated: Drift accumulates silently
enforcedBy: Renovate / Dependabot config

name: I-P1-1
label: I-P1-1 — A commit containing a detected secret is blocked before it leaves the developer machine
condition: A commit containing a detected secret is blocked before it leaves the developer machine
ifViolated: Secret reaches remote, requires rotation
enforcedBy: gitleaks pre-commit hook

name: I-P1-2
label: I-P1-2 — Dockerfile linting (hadolint) and IaC checks (checkov) block commit on failure
condition: Dockerfile linting (hadolint) and IaC checks (checkov) block commit on failure
ifViolated: Bad Dockerfile or IaC ships to PR
enforcedBy: pre-commit framework + hadolint + checkov

name: I-P2-1
label: I-P2-1 — Image is built to tarball only — no push to registry ever
condition: Image is built to tarball only — no push to registry ever
ifViolated: Unscanned image in registry
enforcedBy: Docker build with --output type=tar or no --push

name: I-P2-2
label: I-P2-2 — All five scans complete before build step begins
condition: All five scans complete before build step begins
ifViolated: Build promotes code that fails a scan
enforcedBy: CI job ordering — scans in parallel, build depends on all five

name: I-P2-3
label: I-P2-3 — Trivy scans the tarball — not a registry image
condition: Trivy scans the tarball — not a registry image
ifViolated: A pushed image is scanned; PR gate is bypassed
enforcedBy: Trivy --input tarball.tar

name: I-P2-4
label: I-P2-4 — At least one human approval required before merge
condition: At least one human approval required before merge
ifViolated: No human review of code changes
enforcedBy: GitHub branch protection — required reviewers

name: I-P2-5
label: I-P2-5 — SBOM is generated from the same tarball scanned by Trivy
condition: SBOM is generated from the same tarball scanned by Trivy
ifViolated: SBOM and scan diverge — different artifact
enforcedBy: SBOM tool points at the same tarball

name: I-P3-1
label: I-P3-1 — Image is signed only after it is pushed and scanned — never before
condition: Image is signed only after it is pushed and scanned — never before
ifViolated: Signature covers unscanned image
enforcedBy: CI job ordering — sign depends on container scan

name: I-P3-2
label: I-P3-2 — SBOM attestation is attached only after signing — never before
condition: SBOM attestation is attached only after signing — never before
ifViolated: Attestation has no verified image to anchor to
enforcedBy: CI job ordering — attest depends on sign

name: I-P3-3
label: I-P3-3 — Trivy scans the registry image digest — not a tarball or tag
condition: Trivy scans the registry image digest — not a tarball or tag
ifViolated: Scan and deployed image diverge
enforcedBy: Trivy --image registry/repo@sha256:...

name: I-P3-4
label: I-P3-4 — SLSA provenance is generated only after image is signed
condition: SLSA provenance is generated only after image is signed
ifViolated: Provenance anchors to an unsigned image
enforcedBy: CI job ordering — SLSA depends on sign

name: I-P3-5
label: I-P3-5 — Semantic version tag applied before SBOM and SLSA generation
condition: Semantic version tag applied before SBOM and SLSA generation
ifViolated: SBOM and SLSA reference untagged digest
enforcedBy: CI job ordering — tag before attest and provenance

name: I-P3-6
label: I-P3-6 — All tests pass before DAST runs
condition: All tests pass before DAST runs
ifViolated: DAST runs against a broken application
enforcedBy: CI job ordering — DAST depends on test success

name: I-R-1
label: I-R-1 — No image is promoted from registry to any environment without cosign signature verification
condition: No image is promoted from registry to any environment without cosign signature verification
ifViolated: Unsigned image runs in environment
enforcedBy: cosign verify at registry promotion step

name: I-R-2
label: I-R-2 — SBOM is attached to the registry image before any promotion
condition: SBOM is attached to the registry image before any promotion
ifViolated: Environment has no SBOM for the running image
enforcedBy: OCI SBOM attach step before promotion gate

name: I-R-3
label: I-R-3 — SLSA provenance is attached to the registry image before any promotion
condition: SLSA provenance is attached to the registry image before any promotion
ifViolated: Supply chain attestation missing in environment
enforcedBy: OCI SLSA attach step before promotion gate

name: I-PR-1
label: I-PR-1 — Signature verified in the target environment before ArgoCD / Flux deploys
condition: Signature verified in the target environment before ArgoCD / Flux deploys
ifViolated: Deployment of unverified image
enforcedBy: cosign verify step in promotion workflow
phase: Promotions — all 4 environments (DEV / TEST / STAGING / PROD)

name: I-PR-2
label: I-PR-2 — Deployment references image by digest — never by mutable tag
condition: Deployment references image by digest — never by mutable tag
ifViolated: Tag re-tag swaps running image silently
enforcedBy: GitOps PR sets image: repo@sha256:...
phase: Promotions — all 4 environments (DEV / TEST / STAGING / PROD)

name: I-PR-3
label: I-PR-3 — Promotion to the next environment requires explicit gate approval
condition: Promotion to the next environment requires explicit gate approval
ifViolated: Any environment auto-promotes on test pass
enforcedBy: Manual approval gate or policy gate in ArgoCD
phase: Promotions — all 4 environments (DEV / TEST / STAGING / PROD)

name: I-PR-4
label: I-PR-4 — Tests must pass before gate opens — gate cannot open on partial test results
condition: Tests must pass before gate opens — gate cannot open on partial test results
ifViolated: Broken build promotes through environments
enforcedBy: CI gate condition — all test steps green
phase: Promotions — all 4 environments (DEV / TEST / STAGING / PROD)
